channel.title: Kieu Minh Hieu - Portfolio
channel.description: Personal website and portfolio updates for Unity developer Kieu Minh Hieu.

item.title: Food Rush
item.description: An Android food-service game built in Unity and published on Google Play.

item.title: Supermarket Simulator Prototype
item.description: A Unity prototype exploring supermarket management interactions, item handling, and store simulation systems.

item.title: Mario Kart Demo
item.description: A Unity remake prototype of Mario Kart-style movement, pickups, and moment-to-moment kart interactions.

item.title: Unity Packages
item.description: A collection of reusable Unity packages for pooling, messaging, and fuzzy search workflows.

item.title: Project N
item.description: An RTS prototype inspired by StarCraft II, focused on unit control, tactical combat, and resource-driven progression.

item.title: Tower Defense
item.description: A tower defense prototype based on the Brackeys tutorial, expanded with multiple level layouts.

item.title: T-Rex Runner
item.description: A remake of the classic T-Rex runner game, focused on a simple obstacle loop and quick restart flow.

item.title: Zombie On The Beach
item.description: Zombie On The Beach is a small action game about surviving a strange beach fight while chasing a simple arcade score loop.

item.title: Portfolio Page
item.description: Markdown-rendered portfolio page with selected Unity and frontend work.

item.title: Kieu Minh Hieu Website
item.description: Personal website with portfolio, RSS feed, and CV PDF section.
